prompt: Single hand cue only: tap left hole card (As).
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. As is the hole-card anchor because that blocker cue can upgrade or weaken the range read.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. As is the correct hole-card cue because that blocker can upgrade or weaken the range read.
